channel.title: Preventative
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Preventative, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Managing Side Effects of Head and Neck Cancer Treatments
item.description: Head and neck cancer, which is cancer in the head or neck region, accounts for about 4% of all cancers in the United States. When it’s caught early, i...

item.title: My Mother and Grandmother Both Have Endometriosis, and Doctors Still Dismissed Me
item.description: As told to Marnie Goodfriend March is Endometriosis Awareness Month . As a teenager, I knew that my periods weren’t normal. I was in a lot of pain, an...

item.title: When Artificial Intelligence Starts Rewriting Reality
item.description: By BRIAN JOONDEPH Artificial intelligence is quickly becoming a core part of healthcare operations. It drafts clinical notes, summarizes patient visit...

item.title: As ICE Moved In, Minnesotans Set Up a Shadow Medical System. It’s a Lesson for Other Cities.
item.description: President Donald Trump’s immigration crackdown in Minneapolis forced families into hiding and catalyzed informal medical networks to deliver critical ...

item.title: 5 Things An OB/GYN Wants You To Do Daily For A Way Healthier Vagina
item.description: We don't talk about vaginal health enough.

item.title: Listen: What To Do When Health Insurance Slips Out of Reach
item.description: 2026 has been a challenging year to buy health insurance. Contributing factors include changes to the Medicaid program and hikes to the cost of Obamac...

item.title: Lacking This Vitamin May Increase Your Fracture Risk By Up To 48%
item.description: Make sure you're getting enough of it.

item.title: Trump’s Cuts to Medicaid Threaten Services That Help Disabled People Live at Home
item.description: Iowa patient advocates say that in the face of federal Medicaid cuts, the state is quietly reducing in-home services that help people avoid being inst...

item.title: These Zodiac Signs Are Clueless In Love—Are You One Of Them?
item.description: They're just not romantically inclined.

item.description: This month is 40 years since host Julie Rovner, chief Washington correspondent for KFF Health News, began reporting on health policy in Washington. To...

item.title: This New Testing Program Screens For 50+ Types Of Cancer‡
item.description: With just one blood draw.

item.title: This Sleep Factor Matters More Than Actual Sleep Quality, Study Says
item.description: And it can impact your mood the next day.

item.title: Con la presencia del ICE, habitantes de Minnesota crearon un sistema médico en las sombras. Un aprendizaje para otras ciudades
item.description: Trabajadores de salud dicen que los agentes de inmigración siguen apostados en los estacionamientos de hospitales. Y drones sobrevuelan zonas agrícola...
